name: sngnews-monorepo
description: Monorepo for SNG News - User/Admin Websites and Apps

scripts.build: pnpm --filter user-website build && pnpm --filter admin-website build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter user-website lint && pnpm --filter admin-website lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter user-website typecheck && pnpm --filter admin-website typecheck
